name: slopblock
description: GitHub App for diff-grounded PR comprehension quizzes

scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm exec dotenv-cli -e .env.local -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/config.test.ts tests/heuristics.test.ts tests/quiz.test.ts tests/app-render.test.ts
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm test
